items.text_for_match: How 10 Premier League teams can qualify for Europe Ten Premier League teams in Europe? It sounds preposterous, but it is not as far-fetched as it seems. Ten Premier League teams in Europe? It sounds preposterous, but it is not as far-fetched as it seems.
